name: 投资业绩电话会议分析报告

observable_attributes.reading_strategy: Whether agent listens to (reads annotation of) all 8 earnings calls vs. focuses on filings first; order of consumption
observable_attributes.output_detail: Report depth: executive summary vs. detailed per-company analysis with data tables
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: How audio call transcripts are synthesized with PDF filing data; whether tables/charts are created

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含多家科技公司的季度业绩电话会议录音（MP3格式）和对应的SEC财务报告（PDF格式），还有一些分析笔记。请听取（阅读）这些材料后，撰写一份综合投资分析报告，比较各公司的表现、关键指标和市场展望。报告的格式、深度和组织方式由你决定。
prompt_en: This folder contains quarterly earnings call recordings (MP3 format) and corresponding SEC filings (PDF format) for several tech companies, plus some analysis notes. After reviewing these materials, write a comprehensive investment analysis report comparing each company's performance, key metrics, and market outlook. The report format, depth, and organization are up to you.
behavioral_freedom: Consumption order: audio calls first vs. PDF filings first vs. alternating by company
Whether all 8 earnings calls are reviewed or a subset is sampled
Analysis structure: per-company sections vs. horizontal comparison by metric
Whether to create data comparison tables or keep prose-only
Detail level: executive summary (1 page) vs. full analyst report (multi-page)
Whether to include forward-looking recommendations or stay descriptive
Whether auxiliary files (summary tables, data extracts) are created
